name: Plunder Patrollship Moerk
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海造賊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>プランドロール</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>静</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>寂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のメルケ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>号</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
You can discard 1 "Plunder Patroll" card, then target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; banish it, then you can add 1 "Plunder Patroll" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. This is a Quick Effect if this card is equipped with a "Plunder Patroll" card. You can only use this effect of "Plunder Patrollship Moerk" once per turn. If a "Plunder Patroll" card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can detach 1 material from this card instead.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Applies effect while equipped with an Equip Card
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
misc: Can be activated during either player's turn
